description: You are a Full-Stack Developer for Socioboard. The security team needs to track user IP addresses when they log in. Add a 'last_login_ip' field (VARCHAR(45)) to the 'user_details' table in the 'socioboard' MariaDB database (User: root, no password). Update the Sequelize ORM model at /opt/socioboard/socioboard-api/library/sequelize-cli/models/user_details.js to include the 'last_login_ip' property as DataTypes.STRING(45). Restart the backend microservices using pm2 to ensure the updated model is loaded and the services remain online.
